strengths: Extensive production experience with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) combined with highly relevant, explicit experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators.
Deep commitment to software craftsmanship and testing, demonstrated by applying TDD, creating open-source testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts), and organizing code katas and testing workshops.

Strong architectural and cloud capabilities, with a proven track record of designing scalable, end-to-end platforms using AWS, Kubernetes, MongoDB, and Docker to handle high-volume automated workflows.
concerns: While highly experienced in Node.js and testing generally, the resume lacks explicit mentions of Nest.js, Vitest, and Playwright, requiring minor onboarding to these specific tools.
The most recent Staff Software Engineer position lasted only six months before transitioning into a current career gap.
A long history of running concurrent ventures (such as maintaining GISCollective since 2016 alongside full-time roles) might prompt questions about focus, despite demonstrating high capacity.
response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally strong fit for this Senior Fullstack Developer role, bringing over 15 years of engineering experience with deep expertise in the required TypeScript, Node.js, and React stack. His recent work building AI-agent infrastructure directly satisfies the niche requirement for AI development, while his background with AWS, Kubernetes, and MongoDB perfectly aligns with the cloud and database needs. Furthermore, his demonstrated passion for software craftsmanship—highlighted by his creation of testing libraries, advocacy for TDD, and experience teaching engineering best practices—proves he will be a high-impact contributor capable of driving architectural decisions and elevating the quality of internal automation tooling.
